nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned value and change fields

compositionPolicy.range: Start and end calendars have explicit labels and bounds and share one controlled or uncontrolled range.
compositionPolicy.duration: Inclusive duration is calculated and exposed only when enabled and complete.
compositionPolicy.availability: Any candidate or externally controlled range crossing an unavailable date is rejected or reported with recoverable guidance; consumer reason text remains independently gated.
compositionPolicy.preview: Range highlight attributes, focus and pointer preview events, and the live preview summary exist only when showRangePreview is true.
